indexes.indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_answers_attempt ON public.interview_answers USING btree (attempt_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_answers_attempt_answered_at ON public.interview_answers USING btree (attempt_id, answered_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_answers_attempt_session_status ON public.interview_answers USING btree (attempt_id, session_question_id, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_answers_status ON public.interview_answers USING btree (status)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interview_answers_pkey ON public.interview_answers USING btree (answer_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_attempt_question ON public.interview_answers USING btree (attempt_id, question_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_attempt_question_answer ON public.interview_answers USING btree (attempt_id, question_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_interview_answers_attempt_question ON public.interview_answers USING btree (attempt_id, question_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_session_questions_attempt_order_phase ON public.session_questions USING btree (attempt_id, question_order, question_kind)
CREATE INDEX idx_session_questions_mapped_skill ON public.session_questions USING btree (attempt_id, mapped_skill_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX session_questions_pkey ON public.session_questions USING btree (session_question_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_session_questions_attempt_order ON public.session_questions USING btree (attempt_id, question_order)
CREATE INDEX idx_attempt_interview_status ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (interview_id, status)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_attempts_ends_at ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (ends_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_attempts_last_disconnect ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (last_disconnect_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_attempts_status_last_activity ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (status, last_activity_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_attempts_termination_type ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (termination_type)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_attempts_timer_status ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (status, ends_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interview_attempts_pkey ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (attempt_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_interview_attempt ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (interview_id, attempt_number)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_interview_attempts_interview_attempt ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (interview_id, attempt_number)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ux_interview_active_recovery_token ON public.interview_attempts USING btree (recovery_token_hash) WHERE ((recovery_token_hash IS NOT NULL) AND (recovery_token_used_at IS NULL))
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_ai_screening_candidate ON public.interview_invites USING btree (candidate_id, created_at DESC) WHERE (candidate_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_ai_screening_job ON public.interview_invites USING btree (job_id, created_at DESC) WHERE (job_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_candidate_email_lookup ON public.interview_invites USING btree (lower(COALESCE(candidate_email, email))) WHERE (COALESCE(candidate_email, email) IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_company_candidate_email_sent_at ON public.interview_invites USING btree (company_id, candidate_email, sent_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_company_email_sent_at ON public.interview_invites USING btree (company_id, lower(candidate_email), sent_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_company_job_sent_at ON public.interview_invites USING btree (company_id, job_id, sent_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_interview_id ON public.interview_invites USING btree (interview_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_status_created_at ON public.interview_invites USING btree (status, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_invites_token ON public.interview_invites USING btree (token)
CREATE INDEX idx_invite_interview ON public.interview_invites USING btree (interview_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_invite_token ON public.interview_invites USING btree (token)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interview_invites_pkey ON public.interview_invites USING btree (invite_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interview_invites_token_key ON public.interview_invites USING btree (token)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_token ON public.interview_invites USING btree (token)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_signals_attempt_type_created ON public.interview_signals USING btree (attempt_id, type, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interview_signals_pkey ON public.interview_signals USING btree (signal_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_recordings_attempt_started ON public.interview_recordings USING btree (attempt_id, started_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_interview_recordings_attempt_status ON public.interview_recordings USING btree (attempt_id, status)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_interview_recordings_egress_id ON public.interview_recordings USING btree (egress_id) WHERE (egress_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interview_recordings_pkey ON public.interview_recordings USING btree (recording_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interview_recovery_events_pkey ON public.interview_recovery_events USING btree (recovery_event_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ux_recovery_events_idempotency ON public.interview_recovery_events USING btree (interview_id, idempotency_key) WHERE (idempotency_key IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX forensic_transcripts_pkey ON public.forensic_transcripts USING btree (transcript_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ux_forensic_transcripts_attempt_segment ON public.forensic_transcripts USING btree (attempt_id, segment_index)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_interviews_org_idempotency_key ON public.interviews USING btree (organization_id, idempotency_key) WHERE (idempotency_key IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX interviews_pkey ON public.interviews USING btree (interview_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX candidates_pkey ON public.candidates USING btree (candidate_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_candidates_ai_screening_email ON public.candidates USING btree (organization_id, lower(email)) WHERE (email IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_candidates_ai_screening_org_created_at ON public.candidates USING btree (organization_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_candidates_ai_screening_upload_batch ON public.candidates USING btree (organization_id, upload_batch_id, created_at DESC) WHERE (upload_batch_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_candidates_org_email ON public.candidates USING btree (organization_id, lower(email)) WHERE (email IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_candidates_org_email_lookup ON public.candidates USING btree (organization_id, lower(email)) WHERE (email IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX job_positions_pkey ON public.job_positions USING btree (job_id)
